R

readValue(String) - Static method in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
Reads a JSON file and maps it to a TransportData object.
RouteFinder - Class in com.transportapp.routing
A utility class for finding optimal routes in a transport graph based on various criteria such as lowest price, shortest travel time, or fewest transfers.
RouteFinder() - Constructor for class com.transportapp.routing.RouteFinder
 
RouteSelectionScreen - Class in com.transportapp.gui
Screen for selecting routes between cities with optimization criteria.
RouteSelectionScreen(TransportData) - Constructor for class com.transportapp.gui.RouteSelectionScreen
Constructor that initializes the screen with transport data.
